description: With the open 2D part file 'side.slvs', extrude the sketch by 5.0 mm to create a 3D solid. Save the model as '~/Documents/SolveSpace/side_extruded.slvs'. Determine the volume of the part in mm³ and calculate its mass in grams using an Aluminum density of 2.70 g/cm³ (0.0027 g/mm³). Save the mass value to '~/Documents/SolveSpace/mass_report.txt'.
